message:
Running command: cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526 && \
git config user.email "$github_user_email" && \
git config user.name "$github_user_name" && \
git add docs/dv/verification_checklist.md \
        docs/dv/verification_dashboard.html \
        docs/dv/verification_evaluation_report.md \
        docs/advisory/verification_review_advisory.md && \
git commit -m "verification review: all 97 checklist items [P], 21/21 scenarios PASS, PROCEED_TO_PNR

- Updated docs/dv/verification_checklist.md: all 97 items [ ] → [P] based on
  summary.yaml (pass_count=21, fail_count=0) and 21 simulator logs.
- Created docs/dv/verification_dashboard.html: full HTML dashboard with stat
  cards, scenario table, domain grid, derivative delta table, non-blocking
  observation analysis, and reviewer verdict.
- Created docs/dv/verification_evaluation_report.md: evidence inventory,
  checklist stats, 4 non-blocking observation analyses, zero failure
  classification table, rework_target=NONE, recommendation=PROCEED_TO_PNR.
- Created docs/advisory/verification_review_advisory.md: raw Signoff Advisory
  output (VERDICT: GO) with conditions (ADC waived, GLS post-synthesis).

Verdict: PROCEED_TO_PNR | rework_target: NONE | Advisory: GO

Co-authored-by: $github_user_name <$github_user_email>"

message.content: All artifacts are written. Now commit everything and return the final verdict.
